title: Add changelogBranch field to Project model
summary: Added optional changelogBranch String? field to the Prisma Project model, enabling changelog sync to read from a configurable branch instead of always using defaultBranch.
business_context: Multi-branch changelog synchronization requires projects to optionally specify a separate branch for changelog tracking. This field allows fine-grained control over which branch contains authoritative changelog entries, improving flexibility for teams with complex branching strategies.
affected_users: All projects using changelog sync feature
acceptance_criteria: changelogBranch field added as optional String to Project model
Database schema synced successfully with npx prisma db push
No TypeScript compilation errors from schema change
